item.title: Hugo Website Building Process
item.author: info@natsume.xin (夏沐真凉)
item.description:
Hugo Website Building Process

Author: 夏沐真凉(info@natsume.xin)

Introduction

Since I didn’t want to create a separate blog for this tutorial, I’ll use this article to explain everything in detail, ensuring you can successfully set it up as much as possible.

This article uses the Hugo framework and the hugo-theme-reimu theme. From creation and configuration to deployment, it’s explained clearly in one article. For other themes, please refer to their official documentation.

Article Understanding and Configuration Instructions:

To help you understand this article, I strongly recommend reading this explanation to understand which folder corresponds to which part of the tutorial below:

Published on 2026-02-28 at Jigen_Seiki, last modified on 2026-02-28

item.title: A personal observations and experiences
item.author: info@natsume.xin (夏沐真凉)
item.description:
A personal observations and experiences

Author: 夏沐真凉(info@natsume.xin)

A Personal Observation and Reflection

Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒★

Introduction

This is a purely personal note: about a name and emoticon I often encounter online—“Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒★”.

I’m not trying to conduct authoritative research, nor do I want to put it in the academic drawer; I simply want to write down my intuition, memories, and feelings as a kind of annotation on its existence.

My First Encounter with Ciallo

I remember the first time I saw “Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒★” was in a fanfiction thread.

Published on 2026-02-27 at Jigen_Seiki, last modified on 2026-02-27

item.title: Jigen Seiki——A simple anime/manga website
item.author: info@natsume.xin (夏沐真凉)
item.description:
Jigen Seiki——A simple anime/manga website

Author: 夏沐真凉(info@natsume.xin)

Jigen Seiki - A Simple Anime/Manga Site

If you can access the site successfully, it means it’s complete.

Phew~~

It took several days of fixing and rebuilding bit by bit. Sometimes the website wouldn’t connect due to broken links; sometimes images or CSS styles were missing…

Anyway, there were a lot of problems when we first started building it, and it took a lot of time, but it’s finally finished, just like you see now.

Published on 2026-02-27 at Jigen_Seiki, last modified on 2026-02-27
